# This file is generated by:
#   uv export --frozen --no-dev --no-hashes --format requirements-txt \
#     | grep -v "^-e " > requirements.txt
#   echo "-e ./packages/genie-space-optimizer" >> requirements.txt
#
# To update a dependency:
#   uv lock --upgrade-package <package-name>
#   uv export --frozen --no-dev --no-hashes --format requirements-txt \
#     | grep -v "^-e " > requirements.txt
#   echo "-e ./packages/genie-space-optimizer" >> requirements.txt
#
# All versions are pinned to exact == values from uv.lock (SHA256-verified).
# No hashes here so pip can handle the editable install at the bottom.
#
# For E2E deployed app tests: pip install playwright && playwright install chromium
